use_cases: Displaying upload or download progress in file management interfaces
Showing task completion status in onboarding or setup flows
Visualizing data loading or processing states in dashboards
Indicating multi-step form or checkout progression
Displaying course or learning module completion percentages
ai_summary: A lightweight linear progress bar component built on Ark UI's Progress primitive. Features a clean, flat visual design with rounded track and range elements, smooth CSS transitions, and automatic dark mode support. The component accepts a default value and renders a horizontal bar indicating completion percentage, suitable for displaying upload progress, task completion, or any measurable workflow state in SaaS applications.
